title: [MTR3/4] Vande Bharat (Saffron) - Indian Railways
description: Add the iconic Vande Bharat Express to your Minecraft world with realistic textures and smooth integration for transit mods like MTR. Ideal for modern Indian railway builds.
body:
## 🚄 Vande Bharat Express – Train Resource Pack
---

Bring India's iconic **Vande Bharat Express** to life in Minecraft with this high-quality **train resource pack**! Designed for transit mods like **MTR (Minecraft Transit Railway)**, this pack adds a modern, realistic Indian train experience to your world.

![Front Angle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a24c06d70b7eeccdb2668422a2ff86b8e786e3b8.png)                                             
![Front Angle 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5521fe499150f36cee3a3cb04a7bb22c16a1a4cd.png)
---

### ✨ Features:

* **Accurate exterior design** based on the real Vande Bharat Express
* Sleek textures, smooth curves, and true-to-life color scheme
* Lightweight and performance-optimized
* Ideal for Indian railway-themed builds and transit networks

---

### ⚠️ Warnings:
This resource pack includes .OBJ models for trains. These models are confirmed to work seamlessly on MTR3 with the NTE mod. However, users may experience performance issues (lag spikes/stuttering) on MTR4 due to how the mod currently handles .OBJ models.

Please note:

Performance issues on MTR v4 are beyond our control.

We are not responsible for any lag caused by these limitations.

For best results, use this pack on MTR3 + NTE until the lag issue on MTR4 is fixed by the devs.

Also:

* There may be multiple texture errors or inconsistencies. We are constantly working to fix them, and we’d love your help!
* Make sure your **platform is only 1 block above the track**. Since this is a **broad-gauge train**, higher platforms may visually collide with the train body.
  
![Platform Height Collision](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd808551caefbd2c2cbec3d546cb0801c3213fc0.png)
* We recommend using our [Indian Railways Resources](https://modrinth.com/project/id8qqQsh) pack for best visual alignment and realism with this train model.

  👉 Please report any bugs or visual glitches in our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/2bGWEmvjvZ) so we can address them in future updates.
---

### 📦 Requirements:

* **[Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/XKPAmI6u)** – Base Mod
* **[NTE Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/8pXSjgW8)**(only for MTR3) – for extended functionality or dependencies 
* **[Indian Railways Resources](https://modrinth.com/project/id8qqQsh)** *(optional but recommended)* – ensures accurate alignment with the train model

---

### 🛠️ Installation:

1. Download the `.zip` file
2. Place it into your resource pack folder (e.g., `.minecraft/resourcepacks/`)
3. Enable it in-game
4. For MTR3: Select the 'Vande Bharat OS01FL' train in your Depot
*  For MTR4: Select any coaches with name beginning from 'Vande Bharat'.
---

Whether you're recreating Indian railway routes or building your dream HSR network, the **Vande Bharat Express** adds realism and flair to your transit system.


**📥 Download now and follow for updates as we continue to build India’s fastest train in Minecraft!**
